name: align-user-interface-with-main-conventions
description: Merged the post-2026-07-03 mainline composition, config-loading, VCS, and host-bootstrap conventions into feat/user-interface while preserving the branch-only API, desktop, client, artifact, validation, and log-readback capabilities. The branch now uses the canonical resolver-backed core composition, SDK host bootstrap for API and desktop, and a single shared project-status mapper in @specd/client so HTTP and IPC expose the same DTO contract.
